description: WeChat channel backed by Tencent's iLink bot API. Scan a QR code with the WeChat app to authorise; inbound DMs from authorised users route to the agent through the channel system.
author: tianshu-ai

fields.label: iLink API base URL
fields.description: Override only when Tencent changes the API host. Leave default in production.

fields.label: Bot agent (analytics tag)
fields.description: Identifies your bot in Tencent's iLink logs (analogous to HTTP User-Agent).
